review_budget.note: Project policy: split into sequential dev phases with user checkpoints. Do NOT create multiple PRs.

tasks.title: Add hono dependency
tasks.description: Install hono in package.json. Add hosted:dev script pointing to back/services/hosted/server.ts.

tasks.title: Create hosted app entrypoint
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/app.ts with createHostedApp() factory. Register health, evaluation, audit, and policy routes. Auth middleware on /v1/*.

tasks.title: Create hosted server bootstrap
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/server.ts with Bun serve. Wire createHostedApp() with default dependencies. Read port from env.

tasks.title: Create auth middleware
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/http/hostedAuthMiddleware.ts. Validate Authorization: Bearer header against COMPASS_HOSTED_API_KEY env. Reject 401 on mismatch. Skip auth for /health.

tasks.title: Create error middleware
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/http/hostedErrorMiddleware.ts. Catch unhandled errors, return structured { error: { code, message } } JSON. Log without leaking secrets.

tasks.title: Create health route
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/health/healthRoutes.ts. GET /health returns { ok, service, dependencies }. Check audit store, policy, and LLM connectivity. No auth required.

tasks.title: Create evaluation contracts
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/evaluate/evaluationContracts.ts. Define EvaluateActionRequest, EvaluateActionResponse, HostedDecision, HostedRiskLevel, AuditEntry, PolicySnapshot. These are the canonical HTTP API types shared by local client and hosted routes.

tasks.title: Create audit contracts
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/audit/auditContracts.ts. Define AuditWriteRequest, AuditWriteResponse, AuditQueryParams, AuditListResponse. Include idempotencyKey field.

tasks.title: Create policy contracts
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/policies/policyContracts.ts. Define PolicySnapshotResponse. Re-export or reference policyContracts.ts from guardrail if needed.

tasks.title: Create local hosted client contracts
tasks.description: Create back/services/mcp/proxy/mcpHostedClientContracts.ts. Define HostedClientConfig (url, apiKey, timeoutMs), HostedClientError types, and validation helpers for malformed responses.

tasks.title: Update proxy contracts
tasks.description: Modify back/services/mcp/proxy/mcpProxyContracts.ts. Add hostedDecision field to ProxyDecision. Add auditRef to ProxyCallToolResult. Keep existing downstream types temporarily for migration.

tasks.title: Move policy files to hosted
tasks.description: Copy policyEngine.ts, policyContracts.ts, defaultPolicy.ts, loadPolicy.ts from back/services/guardrail/policy/ to back/services/hosted/policy/. Update imports in hosted code. Do NOT delete originals yet.

tasks.title: Move LLM files to hosted
tasks.description: Copy llmRouterAdapter.ts, llmRouterContracts.ts, llmDecisionAdapter.ts, llmDecisionContracts.ts, llmDecisionSanitizer.ts to back/services/hosted/llm/. Update imports. Do NOT delete originals yet.

tasks.title: Create evaluation service
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/evaluate/evaluationService.ts. Implement evaluateAction(): run LLM router (skip→allow, unknown→deny, transfer/swap→LLM decision judge), apply policy engine, persist audit, return EvaluateActionResponse. All existing logic from mcpProxyDispatcher lines 135–258 moves here.

tasks.title: Create evaluation route
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/evaluate/evaluationRoutes.ts. POST /v1/evaluate validates request schema, calls evaluationService, returns EvaluateActionResponse. 400 on invalid schema, 500 on unexpected errors.

tasks.title: Create audit store
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/audit/auditStore.ts. In-memory Map keyed by correlationId. Write idempotent (same correlationId + idempotencyKey = no-op). Query by userId or sessionId. Return auditRef on write.

tasks.title: Create audit routes
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/audit/auditRoutes.ts. POST /v1/audit/events for writes (idempotent). GET /v1/audits for queries with ?userId or ?sessionId and ?limit.

tasks.title: Create policy service and routes
tasks.description: Create back/services/hosted/policies/policyService.ts and back/services/hosted/policies/policyRoutes.ts. GET /v1/policies returns active policy snapshot from loadPolicy().

tasks.title: Create local hosted client
tasks.description: Create back/services/mcp/proxy/mcpHostedClient.ts. Implement evaluateAction() using fetch + AbortController. Auth header from config. Timeout via AbortController. Strict response validation: missing decision, malformed riskLevel, or missing auditRef → fail-closed deny. Return typed EvaluateActionResponse.

tasks.title: Create evaluation request builder
tasks.description: Create back/services/mcp/proxy/mcpEvaluationRequest.ts. Implement buildEvaluateActionRequest(): generate correlationId, idempotencyKey, normalize toolName/arguments/agentContext/localFindings into EvaluateActionRequest.

tasks.title: Refactor dispatcher for hosted evaluation
tasks.description: Modify back/services/mcp/proxy/mcpProxyDispatcher.ts. Replace LLM router/decision/policy/audit orchestration (lines 135–311) with: (1) local policy interceptor check, (2) hostedClient.evaluateAction() call, (3) enforce hosted decision, (4) send audit outcome. Remove downstream dependency for tool calls. Keep downstream for listTools temporarily. Add feature flag COMPASS_HYBRID_GUARD_ENABLED.

tasks.title: Update mcpServer to inject hosted client
tasks.description: Modify back/services/mcp/server/mcpServer.ts. Stop requiring DownstreamMcpClient for construction. Inject hosted client and execution dependencies. Pass hostedClient to dispatcher config.

tasks.title: Add env config for hosted backend
tasks.description: Modify back/services/envConfig.ts (or mcpRuntimeConfig.ts). Add COMPASS_HOSTED_API_URL, COMPASS_HOSTED_API_KEY, COMPASS_HOSTED_TIMEOUT_MS (default 750), COMPASS_HYBRID_GUARD_ENABLED (default false).

tasks.title: Unit test hosted client
tasks.description: Write tests for mcpHostedClient.ts: success response, timeout/abort, 401 rejection, malformed JSON, missing auditRef fail-closed, network error fail-closed.

tasks.title: Unit test evaluation service
tasks.description: Write tests for evaluationService.ts: router skip→allow, router unknown→deny, transfer/swap→LLM decision judge, policy engine deny, audit persistence, malformed input handling.

tasks.title: Unit test auth middleware
tasks.description: Write tests for hostedAuthMiddleware.ts: valid token passes, missing token 401, invalid token 401, /health skips auth.

tasks.title: Integration test dispatcher refactor
tasks.description: Write/update tests for mcpProxyDispatcher.ts: local deterministic deny skips HTTP, hosted deny blocks execution, hosted confirm returns approval request, hosted timeout fail-closed for high-risk, hosted allow executes. Test COMPASS_HYBRID_GUARD_ENABLED flag behavior.

tasks.title: Integration test hosted routes
tasks.description: Write tests for hosted Hono app: GET /health returns status, POST /v1/evaluate with valid request returns decision, POST /v1/evaluate without auth returns 401, GET /v1/audits returns entries, GET /v1/policies returns snapshot.

tasks.title: E2E MCP stdio test
tasks.description: Write MCP stdio integration test: exercise allowed read-only call (local allow, hosted allow), local deterministic deny (no HTTP call), and hosted timeout fail-closed case. Verify audit records created for allowed calls.

tasks.title: Retire downstream stdio client
tasks.description: Delete back/services/mcp/proxy/downstreamMcpStdioClient.ts and back/services/mcp/proxy/mcpConfigWrapping.ts. Remove imports from all files. Update any tests that reference these.

tasks.title: Retire local authoritative audit
tasks.description: Delete or demote back/services/mcp/proxy/mcpProxyAudit.ts to test-only diagnostics. Remove audit event recording from dispatcher. Keep listProxyAuditEvents for test assertions if needed.

tasks.title: Clean up original moved files
tasks.description: Delete original files from back/services/guardrail/policy/ and back/services/intelligence/ that were copied to hosted. Update any remaining local imports to point to hosted copies or remove unused imports.

tasks.title: Flip hybrid mode default
tasks.description: Change COMPASS_HYBRID_GUARD_ENABLED default from false to true in envConfig. Verify all tests pass with hybrid mode enabled. This is the final migration step.

tasks.title: Add vercel.json for hosted deployment
tasks.description: Create vercel.json at project root if needed. Configure hosted API entrypoint routing for Vercel deployment.

summary.note: Project policy requires sequential dev phases with user checkpoints between phases. No chained PRs — single PR with size exception.
